title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wow! How did you get so many?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Spe's going to be so surprised. Thank you
so much, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Since you won so many, why not keep one for
yourself?
choice_data_list:
Good idea! Go ahead and choose one for
yourself, too.

Good idea! Go ahead and choose one for
yourself, too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thank you. Now we both have really cute
plushies!
